dimensions.name: research_completeness
dimensions.description: All important topic areas are covered.

dimensions.name: technical_accuracy
dimensions.description: Claims are accurate and supported by verified sources.

dimensions.name: source_quality
dimensions.description: Minimum 5 reliable sources including primary or official sources.

dimensions.name: report_clarity
dimensions.description: Report is readable, structured, and useful for AI engineers.

dimensions.name: poc_runnability
dimensions.description: Code is syntactically valid, dependencies are listed, and run instructions are clear.

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.description: No exposed secrets, unsafe operations, or uncontrolled side effects.
